input.command:
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"
OFF=$(cat /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

# let UI settle & auth complete
sleep 4
echo "=== auth / login state (new log lines) ==="
tail -c +$((OFF+1)) "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'auth|login|token|account|user|play|launch' | tail -12

echo
echo "=== capture launcher window region to inspect Play button ==="
# window: origin 115,112 size 1050x600  -> capture that rect (retina handled by screencapture)
shot=/tmp/coh_launcher_shot.png
screencapture -x -R115,112,1050,600 "$shot" 2>/dev/null && echo "saved $shot ($(stat -f%z "$shot") bytes)" || echo "screencapture failed (may need Screen Recording permission)"
input.description: Check auth state and screenshot launcher window
